successful.description: Flag if custom license was successfully installed

AutoPauseMode.description: Automatic pause mode starts with fans going with last fan speed used for mining and slowly decreases speed down to 0%

bsp.description:
A basis point is one hundredth of 1 percentage point.
For example: 1bps = 0.01%, 250bps = 2.5%

CoolingAutoMode.description:
The temperature control modes.
Miner software tries to regulate the fan speed so that miner temperature is approximately at the target temperature.
The allowed temperature range is 0-200 degree Celsius.

oneOf.description: Temperature threshold at which BOSMiner shuts down in order to prevent overheating and damaging the miner.
Temperature threshold at which the fans start to run at 100%.

max_fan_speed.description: Maximum fan speed expressed as a value between 0 and 100. max_fan_speed must be greater than min_fan_speed.

min_fan_speed.description: Minimum fan speed expressed as a value between 0 and 100. min_fan_speed must be less than max_fan_speed.

minimum_required_fans.description: Minimum number of fans required to have BOSminer operational.

oneOf.description: Pause mode used for fans when the miner is paused
Temperature that the miner will try to maintain

minimum_required_fans.description: Minimum number of fans required to have BOSminer operational.

CoolingDisabledMode.description:
Disable temperature control. May be dangerous.
DEPRECATED: Since Braiins OS 24.XX it is not possible to disable cooling mode.

fan_speed_ratio.description:
User defined fan speed expressed as a ratio between 0.0 and 1.0
where 0.0 means completely turned off and
1.0 means running at full speed possible

CoolingManualMode.description: Fans are kept at a fixed, user-defined speed, no matter the temperature.

oneOf.description: Temperature threshold at which BOSMiner shuts down in order to prevent overheating and damaging the miner.

fan_speed_ratio.description:
User defined fan speed expressed as a ratio between 0.0 and 1.0
where 0.0 means completely turned off and
1.0 means running at full speed possible

oneOf.description: Temperature threshold at which the fans start to run at 100%.

minimum_required_fans.description: Minimum number of fans required to have BOSminer operational.

oneOf.description: Temperature that the miner will try to maintain when power scaling is enabled
Power target settings for Dynamic Performance Scaling

powertarget.description: Power target settings for Dynamic Performance Scaling

oneOf.description: Hashrate target settings for Dynamic Performance Scaling

hashratetarget.description: Hashrate target settings for Dynamic Performance Scaling

enabled.description: Flag if Dynamic Performance Scaling is enabled

oneOf.description: Dynamic Performance Scaling minimal hashrate target
Dynamic Performance Scaling minimal power target

on_start_target_percent.description: Initial target for Dynamic Performance Scaling in percent

shutdown_enabled.description: Flag if shutdown for Dynamic Performance Scaling is enabled

oneOf.description: Dynamic Performance Scaling enabled default value
Dynamic Performance Scaling hashrate step constraints
Dynamic Performance Scaling minimal hashrate target constraints
Dynamic Performance Scaling minimal power target constraints
Initial target for Dynamic Performance Scaling in percent
Dynamic Performance Scaling power step constraints
Dynamic Performance Scaling shutdown duration constraints
Dynamic Performance Scaling enabled shutdown default value
Dynamic Performance Scaling minimal hashrate target
Dynamic Performance Scaling minimal power target
Defines how much DevFee should be generated by the device.

FanState.description: Structure which contain info about one specific miner fan.

target_speed_ratio.description: Actual fan speed ratio(PWM) in range 0.0 - 1.0

FixedShareRatio.description:
Structure for fixed share ratio load balance strategy
Fixed share ratio is value between 0.0 to 1.0 where 1.0 represents that all work is
generated from the group

GetCoolingStateResponse.description:
Response to get current fan states and
temperature measurements

bosminer_uptime_s.description: Bosminer uptime. `0` means bosminer is not running

GetNetworkInfoResponse.description:
Response message for GetCurrentNetworkConfiguration
Represents the current network configuration for the default network interface.
Only IPv4 is supported.

mac_address.description: MAC address of the network interface

GetTunerStateResponse.description: Response with the current tuner details

oneOf.description: Default value for flag if hashboards are enabled
Quick ramping time constraints in seconds. Used in curtailments

is_enabled.description: Flag if hashboard is enabled or not

hashboards.description: Per hashboard frequency/voltage. It has higher priority than global one

quick_ramping_time_down_s.description: Quick ramping time down in seconds. Used in curtailments

quick_ramping_time_up_s.description: Quick ramping time up in seconds. Used in curtailments

HashrateTargetProfile.description: Structure to handle hashrate target profile

timeout_s.description:
Authentication token validity/timeout in seconds.
Token validity refreshed to this value with each request.

token.description: Token to be used for authentication

ManualPauseMode.description:
Manual pause mode runs with defined fixed fans speed and either turns off after a certain period of time
or runs indefinitely according to fan_runtime settings

fan_pause_runtime.description:
Controls how long fans run at the fixed speed before turning off.
1 = FAN_PAUSE_RUNTIME_LIMITED - fans run for a limited duration (see `fan_pause_runtime_limited_duration_s` in `CoolingConstraints`) then turn off
2 = FAN_PAUSE_RUNTIME_INDEFINITE - fans run indefinitely at the fixed speed until miner is resumed

pause_cooldown_fan_speed_ratio.description:
User defined pause cooldown fan speed expressed as a ratio between 0.0 and 1.0
where 0.0 means completely turned off and
1.0 means running at full speed possible

hashboards.description: Per hashboard frequency/voltage. It has higher priority than global one

model.description:
Deprecated: Use miner_model instead.
This field is no longer supported.

day_of_month.description: Artificially limited to 1-28 to cover all months

time_to_restricted.description:
BOS Initialization timeout - number of seconds elapsed since bosminer start
i.e., number of seconds BOS will start mining in restricted mode burning 5% of hashrate
For more, see Section 3.10 of <https://braiins.com/os/plus/license>

PauseMode.description: Pause mode to control fans behaviour after you pause the miner

Pool.description: Structure handle information about configured pool

enabled.description: Flag if pool connection is enabled

PoolConfiguration.description: Structure handle information about configured pool

enabled.description: Flag if pool connection is enabled

uid.description:
Pool connection id
If this struct is used when creating a new Pool Configuration, this field must not be specified (it will be generated)
If this struct is used when updating an existing configuration, this field must be specified and represents unique id of pool which will be updated

PoolGroup.description: Structure handle all pool group details

uid.description:
Group id
gRPC: If this struct is used when creating a new Pool Group, this field must not be specified (it will be generated)
gRPC: If this struct is used when updating an existing Pool Group, this field must be specified and represents unique id of Pool group which will be updated
REST: If this struct is used when creating a new Pool Group, this field must not be specified (it will be generated)
REST: If this struct is used when updating an existing Pool Group, this field must not be specified, uid in URL must be specified and represents unique id of Pool group which will be updated

best_share.description: Best share (deprecated: may overflow for values > 2^64-1, use best_share_str instead)

PowerTargetProfile.description: Structure to handle power target profile

oneOf.description: Maximal voltage that can be set in volts
Minimal voltage that can be set in volts

model_name.description: PSU model/version name in human-readable form (e.g. "APW121215b")

down_s.description: Quick ramping time down in seconds when PAUSING the miner. Sets how fast the miner will power off. Used in curtailments

up_s.description: Quick ramping time up in seconds when RESUMING the miner. Sets how fast the miner will power up. Used in curtailments

Quota.description: Structure for quota load balance strategy

RealHashrate.description: Structure which contains HB real hashrate stats.

SetCoolingModeRequestMode.description:
Cooling mode to set. If the cooling mode is changed, all fields that aren't relevant to the new mode are reset to default values.
If the cooling mode values are updated, the new values are applied to the current mode.

enable.description: Flag if Dynamic Performance Scaling should be enabled

enable_shutdown.description: Flag if shutdown for Dynamic Performance Scaling should be enabled

on_start_target_percent.description: Initial target for Dynamic Performance Scaling in percent

enabled.description: Flag if Dynamic Performance Scaling is enabled

on_start_target_percent.description: Initial target for Dynamic Performance Scaling in percent

shutdown_enabled.description: Flag if shutdown for Dynamic Performance Scaling should be enabled

hostname.description: Hostname. Existing value will be preserved if this field is not set.

oneOf.description: Network protocol. Existing value will be preserved if this field is not set.

SetNetworkConfigurationRequestProtocol.description: Network protocol. Existing value will be preserved if this field is not set.

reference.description:
Reference point from which the percentage is calculated
1 = nominal - use nominal (sticker) power/hashrate target as the reference
2 = min - use minimal power/hashrate target as the reference
3 = max - use maximal power/hashrate target as the reference
4 = current - use current power/hashrate target as the reference

disable_cleanup.description: Flag if should disable cleanup of directory, in which uploaded firmware is stored (default is false and do cleanup)

discard_settings.description: Flag if should discard settings (default is false and keep settings)

Timestamp.description:
Custom version of google.protobuf.Timestamp
It is used only during compilation to replace google.protobuf.Timestamp to
enable traits for de/serialization and for generating documentation

hours.description: Hours of day in 24 hour format. Must be from 0 to 23.

minutes.description: Minutes of hour of day. Must be from 0 to 59.

seconds.description: Seconds of minutes of the time. Can be from 0 to 59.

oneOf.description: Defines how much DevFee should be generated by the device.

time_to_restricted.description:
Current license expiration - number of seconds since the moment the license was received
i.e., number of seconds BOS will start mining in restricted mode burning 15% of hashrate

best_share.description: Best share (deprecated: may overflow for values > 2^64-1, use best_share_str instead)

put.description: Performs Factory Reset.

200.description: Successful response containing bool if enabled.

put.description: Sets locate device status (turn LED blinking on or off).

requestBody.description: Enable or disable.

200.description: Successful response containing bool if enabled.

put.description: Pauses mining.

200.description: Successful response containing bool if was already paused.

put.description: Reboots mining.
Restarts mining.

200.description: Successful response containing bool if was already running.

put.description: Resumes mining.

200.description: Successful response containing bool if was already mining.

put.description: Starts mining.

200.description: Successful response containing bool if was already running.

put.description: Stops mining.

200.description: Successful response containing bool if was already stopped.

post.description: Authenticates a user using their username and password. If the credentials are valid, a token is returned, which should be included in the `Authorization` header of subsequent requests.

requestBody.description: User login credentials, including username and password.

200.description: Successful login. Returns an authentication token.

put.description: Allows a user to set or update their password. To remove the password, set the `password` field to `null`. This operation requires authentication.

requestBody.description: Payload containing the new password. If the password field is null, the password will be removed.

200.description: Successful response containing miner configuration constraints

put.description: Sets the active cooling mode for the miner. The mode can be set to auto, manual, immersion, or hydro.

requestBody.description: Cooling mode to activate. Can be one of: auto, manual, immersion, or hydro.

200.description: Successful response containing active cooling mode

get.description: Retrieves the current cooling state of the miner, including temperature measurements and the state of all fans.

200.description: Successful response containing information about temperature measurements and fans states

get.description: Returns the OpenAPI specification in JSON format, which can be used by Redoc or Swagger UI for documentation.

200.description: Openapi schema in a JSON format

put.description: Apply custom contract key.

requestBody.description: Custom contract key to be set.

200.description: Successful response with successful flag to indicate success.

get.description: Retrieves the current license state of the miner. The license may be in one of several states: none, limited, valid, or expired.

200.description: Successful response containing information about license

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about the miner, such as hardware model, firmware version, serial number, and other identifying data.

200.description: Successful response containing detailed miner information.

get.description: Retrieves a list of errors reported by the miner, including timestamps, messages, error codes, and affected components.

200.description: Successful response containing an array of miner errors.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about all hashboards in the miner, including their status, temperature, voltage, frequency, and statistics.

200.description: Successful response containing a list of hashboards.

patch.description: Enables or disables one or more hashboards based on the provided IDs. Useful for toggling hardware components during runtime or diagnostics.

requestBody.description: List of hashboard IDs to update and the desired enabled state.

200.description: Successful response with the updated enable state of hashboards.

get.description: Streams the merged log file for a given log type. Supported log types: errors, bosminer, boser, monitor, syslog, dmesg.
Retrieves runtime statistics about the miner, including pool performance, hashrate metrics, and power consumption.

Streams the current status of the miner in real-time. The status can be one of: `unspecified`, `not_started`, `normal`, `paused`, `suspended`, or `restricted`. The response is a continuous JSON stream.

requestBody.description: Support archive format. Format can be one of: 'zip' (compressed zip format), 'bos' (BOS custom format) or 'zipencrypted' (compressed encrypted zip format).

get.description: Fetches detailed information about the miner's network, including interfaces, MAC addresses, DNS settings, and default gateway.

200.description: Successful response containing miner network information.

get.description: Fetches the miner's network configuration, including interface settings, IP configurations, and routing details.

patch.description: Updates the miner's network configuration. Users can modify one or more fields, such as the hostname, network protocol, or DNS settings.

requestBody.description: Partial or full network configuration update request.

put.description: Sets DPS for the miner, including DPS enable flag, DPS shutdown enable flag, DPS shutdown duration, DPS target, DPS mode and initial target for DPS.

requestBody.description: Save action (deprecated), DPS enable flag, DPS shutdown enable flag, DPS shutdown duration, DPS target, DPS mode and initial target for DPS.

put.description: Sets hashrate target for the miner.

requestBody.description: Hashrate target to be set.

patch.description: Decrements hashrate target for the miner by a set value.

requestBody.description: Hashrate target decrement.

put.description: Sets default hashrate target for the miner.

patch.description: Increments hashrate target for the miner by a set value.

requestBody.description: Hashrate target increment.

patch.description: Sets hashrate target to a relative reference by a set percentage.

requestBody.description: Set relative target

patch.summary: Set hashrate target to a relative reference

get.description: Fetches miner's performance mode, including manual or tuner mode.

put.description: Sets performance mode for the miner.

requestBody.description: Performance mode.

put.description: Sets power target for the miner.

requestBody.description: Power target to be set.

patch.description: Decrements power target for the miner by a set value.

requestBody.description: Power target decrement.

put.description: Sets default power target for the miner.

patch.description: Increments power target for the miner by a set value.

requestBody.description: Save action and power target increment.

patch.description: Sets power target to a relative reference by a set percentage.

requestBody.description: Set relative target

patch.summary: Set power target to a relative reference

put.description: Sets quick ramping up and down times for the miner (used in curtailments).

requestBody.description: Quick ramping up and down times to be set.

200.description: Successful response containing quick ramping up and down times (s).

put.description: Sets default quick ramping up and down times for the miner (used in curtailments).

200.description: Successful response containing quick ramping up and down times (s).

get.description: Fetches miner's target profiles, including power and hashrate target profiles.

delete.description: Removes tuner profiles. If it was mining before stops and then starts mining.

get.description: Fetches miner's tuner state, including overall tuner state and power or hashrate mode both including profile and current target.
Fetches the list of all configured pool groups, including their pools, load balancing strategy, and status.

200.description: A list of pool groups with their respective pools and configurations.

post.description: Creates a new pool group with a specified name, list of pools, and load balancing strategy.

put.description: Sets the pool groups with new configurations, replacing the existing ones.

requestBody.description: A list of pool group configurations to set.

delete.description: Deletes a pool group configuration based on the provided UID.

parameters.description: The UID of the pool group to be deleted.
parameters.name: uid

delete.summary: Delete a pool group by UID

put.description: Updates the specified pool group with a new name, list of pools, and load balancing strategy.

parameters.description: The UID of the pool to be updated.
parameters.name: uid

requestBody.description: Pool group configuration to be updated.
Auto-upgrade configuration

post.description: Uninstalls BraiinsOS and restores the miner to its original stock firmware. After initial checks pass, the response is returned and the restoration continues in the background. The device will become unreachable as the process proceeds. Not supported on all platforms (e.g. BMM) or SD card installations.

409.description: Another system task is already in progress.

501.description: Uninstall is not supported on this platform.

requestBody.description: Stream of metadata and data. First message of the stream has to be `metadata`. Additional messages of the stream have to be `data`.

409.description: Another system task is already in progress.

get.description: Returns current API version with informations about major, minor and patch version numbers.

200.description: Major version number - breaking changesMinor version number - backwards compatible changesPatch version number - bug fix changes
